type: 工程感时序图（UML sequence diagram）
goal: 生成一张微信支付 JSAPI/Native 混合视角的时序位图，突出商户系统、微信支付平台与手机微信客户端三方的同步调用与 notify_url 回调

canvas.background: deep slate #0F172A with subtle 1px grid #1E293B at 32px spacing

title_strip.title: WeChat Pay · unified order to notify
title_strip.subtitle: mchid 1900006XXX · H5/公众号场景
title_strip.position: top-left, JetBrains Mono / SF Mono, light gray

header_box_style.size: 160px wide × 64px tall, all headers identical size, evenly spaced
header_box_style.label: actor name in mono 11pt + small icon glyph above name

lifelines.rule: 每个 actor header 下方画垂直虚线 lifeline

items.label: 1. POST /checkout session { sku_id, openid, amount: 19900, currency: CNY }
2. 生成 out_trade_no、attach、notify_url 幂等 key
3. POST /v3/pay/transactions/jsapi Authorization: WECHATPAY2-SHA256... body { mchid, appid, out_trade_no, description, amount{total}, payer{openid} }
5. 200 { timeStamp, nonceStr, package: prepay_id=..., signType, paySign } 给 H5/JS
7. 用户确认指纹/密码，扣款
8. POST notify_url? 签名 X-Wechatpay-Signature, body { out_trade_no, transaction_id, trade_state: SUCCESS }
9. 200 应答 { code: SUCCESS }（必须在 5s 内）
10. 前端轮询或 WebSocket 收到 order_status=PAID
11. 补偿：GET /v3/pay/transactions/out-trade-no/{out_trade_no} 若 notify 未达

message_style.sync: solid line 1.5px slate #94A3B8, filled triangle arrowhead at target
message_style.async: solid line 1.5px slate #94A3B8, hollow triangle arrowhead
message_style.return: dashed line 1.5px slate #64748B, hollow triangle arrowhead

messages.label_format: 编号 + 消息摘要，含关键 HTTP / 字段名

activation_bars.rule: 商户后端与 pay API 在请求处理段画激活条

notes.rule: 在 M3 侧注释：mTLS/平台证书 与 APIv3 密钥用于验签与加密敏感字段

loops_alts.rule: alt 框：notify 重试 与 查询单补偿

legend.content: sync vs return vs notify(callback)；external actor 为 slate

avoid: 声称可编辑 PlantUML 源
